## Summary

Describe the product or technical change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- What changed:
- What intentionally did not change:
- Architecture or data-boundary impact:

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm audit` reviewed
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Product quality

- [ ] Keyboard and visible focus checked for changed interactions
- [ ] Reduced motion and responsive behavior checked where relevant
- [ ] Genuine screenshots attached for visible changes
- [ ] No secret, local environment file, copied reference asset, or fabricated claim added
- [ ] Documentation updated for changed contracts or setup

## Notes

List skipped checks, unavailable credentials, migration steps, or follow-up work.
